title: poa annua var. ovalis
intro: Poa annua var. ovalis, also known as the annual bluegrass or small-leaved annual meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa annua var. ovalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
